h comes before l. So Stahl comes before Stall.

h is before l. So Stahl < Stall.
So Left Column ends with Stahlwellen. Right Column starts with Stalleinrichtungen.
This fits perfectly!
So the reading order is Left Column (top to bottom), then Right Column (top to bottom).
